content: Combine Employee Name and Primary Email into one column like 'Name (email)'.

```
Concat(EmployeeName, " (", PrimaryEmail, ")")
```
This expression will produce a **Text** output.

Suggested column name: **Contact Information**

Successfully created the calculated column 'Contact Information' and added it to your report.
